word: H63 - אָבֵל הַשִּׁטִּים - ʼÂbêl hash-Shiṭṭîym - aw-bale' hash-shit-teem' - Abelshittim

sections.paragraph:
Original: אבל השּׁטּים

Transliteration: 'âbêl hashshiṭṭı̂ym

Phonetic: aw-bale' hash-shit-teem'

BDB Definition:

Abel Shittim = "meadow of acacias"
  1. place in lowlands of Moab

Origin: from H58 and the plural of H7848, with the article inserted

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
Cognate: H58, H59, H62, H64, H65, H66, H67
